mapper.sql: code, day, name, open, high, low, trade, last_trade, percent, volume, amount, ma5, ma10, ma20, ma30, ma60, ma120, dea, dif, macd, cross_params, source_type
mapper.select: select * from weekk where code = #{code} and day = #{day}
mapper.delete: delete from weekk where code = #{code} and day = #{day}
mapper.insert: insert into weekk (code, day, name, open, high, low, trade, last_trade, percent, volume, amount, ma5, ma10, ma20, ma30, ma60, ma120, dea, dif, macd, cross_params, source_type, create_time, update_time) values (#{code}, #{day}, #{name}, #{open}, #{high}, #{low}, #{trade}, #{lastTrade}, #{percent}, #{volume}, #{amount}, #{ma5}, #{ma10}, #{ma20}, #{ma30}, #{ma60}, #{ma120}, #{dea}, #{dif}, #{macd}, #{crossParams}, #{sourceType}, now(), now())
mapper.select:
select max(day) from weekk where code = 'sh600000'
and day < #{fromDay}

select
from weekk s
and s.code in
#{item}
